bullets: Own SOX-compliance IRDR (Inventory Discrepancy Research Report) workflows — hand-researched 1,000+ inventory mismatches and built the data systems that support Sarbanes-Oxley audit requirements.
Built ICQA SQL and Excel reporting for inventory accuracy, discrepancy review, and defect visibility; surfaced findings in dashboards and recurring leadership reports.
Authored an Anthropic-powered SQL copilot that contextually references every available data table for analysts.
Built and shipped an autonomous root-cause-analysis bot that performs full end-to-end inventory research.
